Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}Did Nyx create this place...? Or was it him?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 4 25 25}Yamagishi, is he all right!? What happened!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 3 25 25}Everything disappeared after being covered in that light. I don't sense anything now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 2 25 25}What the hell're you saying!? That's impossible![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 2 25 25}We put our lives on the line, just like he did...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 2 25 25}In fact, we came here expecting to die... So why only him!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 10 25 25}Why am I so powerless...? Am I really unable to protect the ones important to me!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 8 25 25}You're out there, aren't you!? I know you are![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 8 25 25}I refuse to believe that you're gone![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can hear everyone desperately[n]calling out to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Peace will return to this universe, for you... and for him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}He's found the answer to life's greatest question.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}It just happened a bit sooner than it will for the rest of you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Aigis... You'll find the answer one day as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}You just need to realize how the bonds of friendship have changed you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}The Dark Hour will soon vanish from this world... You will truly be liberated from its dominion.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Congratulations, you have the miracle you sought.[n]{f 1 1}
